title: Family network pilot evaluation: initial research report
body: "Launched in 2023, the family network pilot trialled a new form of support for the wider friends and family of children going through family court pre-proceedings.  As part of the family network pilot, DfE commissioned an implementation and process evaluation, and impact evaluation of the pilot. The findings in this report focus on the experiences of strategic and delivery stakeholders in introducing and embedding the pilot.  "

taxons.title: Safeguarding and social care for children
